scripts.build:packages: pnpm -C packages/shared-types build && pnpm -C packages/config build && pnpm -C packages/domain build && pnpm -C packages/api-contracts build && pnpm -C packages/validation build && pnpm -C packages/privacy build && pnpm -C packages/realtime build && pnpm -C packages/auth build && pnpm -C packages/geo build && pnpm -C packages/ui build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm build:packages && pnpm -C apps/webapp typecheck && pnpm -C apps/desktopapp typecheck && pnpm -C apps/mobileapp typecheck
